title: All-Ceramic Restorations
short_description: Metal-free zirconia, lithium disilicate and esthetic ceramic restoration solutions.
description: Esthetic metal-free restorations for clinics that need natural translucency, controlled fit and dependable strength. This category covers zirconia crowns, lithium disilicate veneers and ceramic solutions for anterior and posterior cases.

gallery.alt: All-ceramic crowns and veneers on a dental model
gallery.caption: Finished all-ceramic restorations with controlled shade, fit and surface characterization.

gallery.alt: All-ceramic dental crowns with natural translucent shade
gallery.caption: Additional ceramic crown view showing shade transition and lifelike translucency.

gallery.alt: All-ceramic restoration detail on a dental model
gallery.caption: Detail image of metal-free ceramic restorations prepared for clinical delivery.

gallery.alt: Close-up of zirconia crowns and lithium disilicate veneers
gallery.caption: Close-up view of ceramic translucency, margins and natural enamel texture.

gallery.alt: Technician inspecting all-ceramic crowns in a dental laboratory
gallery.caption: Lab inspection scene for shade, surface finish and fit before dispatch.

details.label: Applications
details.text: Anterior esthetic cases, posterior crowns, veneers, inlays and onlays.

details.label: Materials
details.text: Zirconia, multilayer zirconia and lithium disilicate ceramic options.

details.label: Workflow
details.text: Digital margin review, CAD design, milling or pressing, sintering, staining and glazing.

details.label: Case Files
details.text: STL files, impressions, shade photos and preparation notes are supported.

inquiry.title: Request all-ceramic quotation support.
inquiry.description: Send material, shade, quantity, case files and delivery requirements. Our team will reply by email or WhatsApp.
inquiry.message_placeholder: Material, shade, delivery date or special notes

seo.title: All-Ceramic Restorations | MEIJIA DENTAL
seo.description: All-ceramic dental restorations from MEIJIA DENTAL, including zirconia crowns, lithium disilicate veneers, inlays and onlays.
